name: oat-tools
description: Owen's Applied Thinking — content production commands for VS Code

commands.title: OAT: Promote All Tables in Document

oat.googleOAuthToken.description: Google OAuth access token (Drive + Sheets scopes). Fallback if no service account file.

oat.gasWebAppUrl.description: Deployed Apps Script web app URL for OAT table styling. If blank, formatting applied via Sheets API.

oat.imageStagingSheetId.description: Google Sheet ID for image staging. Share with oat-tools@oat-tools-owen.iam.gserviceaccount.com.

oat.imagesRepoPath.description: Absolute path to the local images repo. Defaults to ~/dev/images.
